heading: Imposition of tax
label: 4251 Imposition of tax
notes: CodificationThis subchapter, relating to the tax on communications, was repealed by , , , as amended by , , ; , , , effective with respect to amounts paid pursuant to bills first rendered on or after . In the case of communications services rendered before , for which a bill has not been rendered before , a bill shall be treated as having been first rendered on .Pub. Effective Date of 1966 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 89–368, title II, § 202(c)80 Stat. 66Mar. 15, 1966“The amendments made by subsections (a) [amending this section] and (b) [amending ] shall apply to amounts paid pursuant to bills first rendered on or after , for services rendered on or after such date. In the case of amounts paid pursuant to bills rendered on or after such date for services which were rendered before such date and for which no previous bill was rendered, such amendments shall apply except with respect to such services as were rendered more than 2 months before such date. In the case of services rendered more than 2 months before such date, the provisions of subchapter B of chapter 33 of the Code in effect at the time such services were rendered, subject to the provision of section 701(b)(2) of the Excise Tax Reduction Act of 1965 [see Effective Date of 1965 Amendment note below], shall apply to the amounts paid for such services.”section 4253 of this titleApril 1, 1966

Effective Date of 1965 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 89–44, title VII, § 701(b)(2)(A)79 Stat. 156June 21, 1965“The amendments made by section 302 [amending this section and sections 4252, 4253, and 4254 of this title] (relating to communication services) shall apply to amounts paid pursuant to bills rendered on or after , for services rendered on or after such date. In the case of amounts paid pursuant to bills rendered on or after , for services which were rendered before such date and for which no previous bill was rendered, such amendments shall apply except with respect to such services as were rendered more than 2 months before such date. In the case of services rendered more than 2 months before such date, the provisions of subchapter B of chapter 33 of the Code in effect at the time such services were rendered shall apply to the amounts paid for such services.”January 1, 1966January 1, 1966

Effective Date of 1958 Amendment, , , as amended by , , , provided that:Pub. L. 85–859, title I, § 133(b)72 Stat. 1292Pub. L. 99–514, § 2100 Stat. 2095Sept. 2, 1958Oct. 22, 1986“(1)Subject to the provisions of paragraph (2), the amendment made by subsection (a) [amending this section and sections 4252 to 4254 of this title] shall apply with respect to amounts paid on or after the effective date prescribed in section (1)(c) of this Act for services rendered on or after such date.“(2)The amendment made by subsection (a) [amending this section and sections 4252 to 4254 of this title] shall not apply with respect to amounts paid pursuant to bills rendered before the effective date prescribed in section 1(c) of this Act. In the case of amounts paid pursuant to bills rendered on or after such date for services for which no previous bill was rendered, such amendments shall apply except with respect to such services as were rendered more than 2 months before such date. In the case of services rendered more than 2 months before such date the provisions of subchapter B of chapter 33 of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 [formerly I.R.C. 1954] in effect at the time such services were rendered shall apply to the amounts paid for such services.”

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: There is hereby imposed on amounts paid for communications services a tax equal to the applicable percentage of amounts so paid.

children.heading: Payment of tax
children.label: 2 Payment of tax
children.text: The tax imposed by this section shall be paid by the person paying for such services.

children.heading: Special rule
children.label: c Special rule
children.text: For purposes of subsections (a) and (b), in the case of communications services rendered before November 1 of a calendar year for which a bill has not been rendered before the close of such year, a bill shall be treated as having been first rendered on December 31 of such year.

children.heading: Treatment of prepaid telephone cards
children.label: d Treatment of prepaid telephone cards
A
children.text: the face amount of such card shall be treated as the amount paid for such communications services, and

children.label: B
children.text: that amount shall be treated as paid when the card is transferred by any telecommunications carrier to any person who is not such a carrier.

children.heading: Determination of face amount in absence of specified dollar amount
children.label: 2 Determination of face amount in absence of specified dollar amount
children.text: In the case of any prepaid telephone card which entitles the user other than to a specified dollar amount of use, the face amount shall be determined under regulations prescribed by the Secretary.

children.heading: Prepaid telephone card
children.label: 3 Prepaid telephone card
children.text: For purposes of this subsection, the term “prepaid telephone card” means any card or any other similar arrangement which permits its holder to obtain communications services and pay for such services in advance.
